summary: Test suite well-designed for act/workflow-based testing with clear helpers, proper temp repo isolation, and specific output assertions that would catch regressions on happy paths. Covers main functionality (manifest parsing, license classification, allow/deny/unknown status, exit codes, workflow structure validation). However, significant gaps in rigor: no error handling tests despite implementation supporting error scenarios (missing files, malformed JSON, invalid config, non-executable command), no edge cases (empty manifests, single vs. many dependencies, special characters), no boundary condition testing. All tests are integration-level; missing unit-level function tests. Fixtures referenced but not shown in provided code, making full coverage verification impossible. Would catch regressions for tested scenarios but miss issues with error conditions and edge cases.
